Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science 56 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 163 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 136 upvotes, 17 comments
  4. Attention Residuals 207 upvotes, 29 comments
  5. Ghostling 268 upvotes, 51 comments
  6. Mamba-3 217 upvotes, 43 comments
  7. AI Team OS – Turn Claude Code into a Self-Managing AI Team 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 280 upvotes, 83 comments
  10. 404 Deno CEO not found 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 65 upvotes, 16 comments
  12. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 115 upvotes, 41 comments
  13. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1052 upvotes, 515 comments
  14. Molly Guard 163 upvotes, 68 comments
  15. How HN: Ironkernel – Python expressions, Rust parallel 22 upvotes, 5 comments
  16. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 393 upvotes, 197 comments
  17. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 185 upvotes, 88 comments
  18. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 117 upvotes, 63 comments
  19. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 257 upvotes, 167 comments
  20. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 86 upvotes, 48 comments
  21. Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004) 68 upvotes, 37 comments
  22. Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel 63 upvotes, 34 comments
  23. Some Things Just Take Time 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  24. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 374 upvotes, 286 comments
  25. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 603 upvotes, 481 comments
  26. Just make it hard to fail 23 upvotes, 11 comments
  27. The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020) 30 upvotes, 18 comments
  28. Books of the Century by Le Monde 11 upvotes, 4 comments
  29. Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, "drastically" reduced the number of cars 144 upvotes, 163 comments
  30. Major leap towards reanimation after death as mammal's brain preserved 31 upvotes, 35 comments

Last generated 12:00am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
